MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FRANKE CONSUMER PRODUCTS, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIMS FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - The motion to strike is granted without leave to amend for plaintiff has not asserted a basis for an award of attorneys' fees. Doing so does not limit plaintiff's ability to recover fees based on discovery statutes. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Continued To Aug-26-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. DEFENDANT FRANKE CONSUMER PRODUCTS, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is continued to August 26, 2008. Parties to provide courtesy copies of opposition and reply with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
